messages.startupErr: Grunteon failed to start. Check that the installation directory is complete and accessible.
messages.jreNotFoundErr: No compatible Java runtime was found. Grunteon requires Java 21 or newer.
messages.jreVersionErr: The detected Java runtime is too old. Install Java 21 or newer and try again.
messages.launcherErr: The launcher failed to initialize. Reinstall Grunteon and try again.
messages.instanceAlreadyExistsMsg: Grunteon is already running. Check the existing window in the taskbar.
